title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Unknown person #4 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not only did URA- Shima get dumped...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: his top knot was cut off, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You may not have any questions

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why did I... do that in front of so many people....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's preparing his equinox Harte!!! When he uses it, his opponents go flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but he's not the type of man to use it on a woman....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 22 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
